title: Mozart Piano Quartet KV 478 - II. Andante
description:
Piano Quartet No. 1 in G minor, K. 478, by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart; 2nd movement, Andante, in B-flat major.

Benjamin Telmányi Lylloff, piano
Anika Telmányi Lylloff, violin
Kwame Cole, viola
Matthieu Fontana, cello

Performed at the international Schiller Institute conference in Rüsselsheim, Germany, on July 3, 2011.

http://schillerinstitut.com
